prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: web app dish card image
Primary request: Avena cremosa con platano y leche, only the plated food.
Scene/backdrop: clean light kitchen tabletop, no people.
Subject: bowl of creamy oatmeal topped with banana slices and a little cinnamon, with a small glass of milk nearby.
Style/medium: bright appetizing food photography, realistic.
Composition/framing: 4:3 horizontal close-up, centered dish, generous padding.
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, fresh and healthy.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logos, no hands, only food.
composition: 4:3 horizontal close-up, centered food, clean background
constraints: no text, no watermark, no logos, no people, no hands
